subcodes.first_line: The Book from Us, unto him who hath been drawn by the breeze of yearning unto the Daystar of the horizons and hath turned unto God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن مال من نسمه الاشتیاق الی نیر الافاق و اقبل الی الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
